texto: He was in conflict with himself. There was no enjoyment in the thought that he had escaped a great danger, and in the midst of his uneasy reflections he had a sudden breathless conviction that she made him feel old because he loved her. Then he felt a hatred of himself, gathering into one mighty heap all the fierce and bitter hatred he had cherished for others and pouring it out on himself.
explicacao: Citação de Norbert Jacques sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “He was in conflict with himself. There was no enjoyment in the thought that he had escaped a grea…” articula amor, detectives, evil em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como evil e gambling.

There was no enjoyment in the thought that he had escaped a great danger, and in the midst of his uneasy reflections he had a sudden breathless conviction that she made him feel old because he loved her. Then he felt a hatred of himself, gathering into one mighty heap all the fierce and bitter hatred he had cherished for others and pouring it out on himself.
